### 3. §5A.3 — changelog catch-up for merged PRs

Append entries to §5A.3 for every PR merged since the last entry. Run
`git log --merges --oneline origin/main` and identify the relevant entries
since `#225` (the §5A.2 sample regeneration). For each, write a
one-paragraph entry following the existing changelog style (PR number +
title + 2–3 sentence summary). Cover at minimum:

- **#226** — Tendering pipeline board layout fix (Withdrawn column was
  rendering below Draft due to a `repeat(6)` grid; fixed to `repeat(7)`).
- **#227** — Hard-delete + edit for tenders and quotes with safeguards
  (audit-before-delete; permission gate behind `tenders.manage`;
  typed-confirmation gate for AWARDED/CONTRACT_ISSUED; cascade preflight;
  `onDelete: SetNull` on SafetyIncident + HazardObservation tender FKs).
- **#228** — Full-feature template tender seeded (IS-T100) — 4 disciplines,
  18 scope items including concrete cutting / coring / grinding, 2 provisional
  sums, 2 cost options, 8 linked assumptions, 7 exclusions, 3 referenced
  drawings; ClientQuote IS-T100-R1 with `assumptionMode=linked`,
  `detailLevel=detailed`, all show-flags on.
- **#229** — Scope of Works: make dimension overrides stick across save /
  refresh. Replaces the unconditional dirty-flag reset with `isDimensionOverride`
  detection so saved overrides on SQM / M³ / Tonnes display as overrides
  after reload.
- **#230** — Scope of Works: cascade-release downstream overrides on
  upstream edit. Editing L/H/D/density/sqm/m³ now releases the dirty flag
  on downstream fields so live recompute fires correctly.
- **#231** — Tender Detail: fix phantom Clarifications draft. Added
  `isDirty` predicate to `useFormDraft` so the visibilitychange auto-save
  only fires when the form is open AND has user content. Defect 2
  (Activity Post discarding content) was verified as a Cowork test artifact —
  no code change needed.
- **#232** — Tender UX polish: canonical status labels + delete-dialog
  cascade list. Centralised the 7 status labels into `tenderStatusLabels.ts`,
  fixed the detail-page dropdown missing `CONTRACT_ISSUED`, added the
  `tenderClients` line to the ConfirmDeleteDialog cascade list.
- **#233** — Dev tooling: harden `dev-start.bat` against dirty-tree pulls.
  Replaced the warning-then-continue block with a fail-fast guard that
  exits non-zero on a dirty working tree; auto-kills orphan listeners on
  ports 3000 / 5173 via inline PowerShell.

If any commit between #225 and `HEAD` is missing from this list, add an
entry for it too in chronological order.

### 4. §5A.3 — queue the in-flight Tendering UX wave (four PRs)

Add four 🔲 entries to the queued section of §5A.3:

- **🔲 PR A — Tendering: density as Rates & Lists lookup** —
  New `EstimateMaterialDensity` model + seed of 13 IS-relevant defaults +
  admin UI section + Material dropdown on the scope item form. Density input
  becomes read-only and looked-up. Replaces the per-item free-text density.
- **🔲 PR B — Tendering: card-header summaries + override highlight +
  proportional cost appropriation** — Three interlocking pieces. (1) Shared
  override-highlight design token (`--surface-override` ≈ `#FDD387`) and
  revert (↺) icon, adopted across dimension overrides + new summaries + T&C
  clauses. (2) Per-card header zone shows peak crew + total person-days +
  per-equipment plant peak + card duration, all overridable.
  (3) Quote → Edit adjustments distribute proportionally across cost lines
  by their share of the un-overridden total; no compounding, no mutation of
  the underlying base values.
- **🔲 PR C — Tendering: floating bulk editor for Assumptions / Exclusions
  (Alt+A)** — New top-right anchored resizable panel reachable from
  Overview + Scope of Works tabs (hidden on Quote). Writes through to the
  same `TenderAssumption` / `TenderExclusion` data; size persists per user.
- **🔲 PR D — Tendering: unified communications panel** — Replace the
  separate Activity timeline + Clarifications & Communications + Follow-ups
  panels with one `TenderEntry`-backed panel. Type dropdown
  (Note / RFI / Email / Call / Meeting / Follow-up / Self-reminder / Task)
  drives conditional fields (due date, assignee, status). Task assignment
  to non-field users with both in-app + email notifications. Legacy tables
  stay one release cycle then drop in a follow-up PR.
